THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: BASED UPON THE PARTIES' STIPULATION, AND GOOD CAUSE APPEARING THEREFOR, THIS CONSENT JUDGMENT IS APPROVED AND JUDGMENT IS HEREBY ENTERED ACCORDING TO ITS TERMS. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ERIKA MCCARTNEY'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF CONSENT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH THE REQUIREMENTS FOR PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENTS UNDER HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTION 25249.7. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE WARNING THAT IS REQUIRED BY THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTIONS 25249.5-25249.14; THE AWARD OF ATTORNEY'S FEES IS REASONABLE UNDER CALIFORNIA LAW; AND THE PENALTY AMOUNT IS REASONABLE BASED ON THE CRITERIA SET FORTH IN HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTION 25249.7(B)(2).ORDER AND JUDGMENT ARE SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-22-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-20-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ERIKA MCCARTNEY's Motion For Entry Of Consent Judgment is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements under Health & Safety Code section 25249.7. The Court finds that the warning that is required by the settlement complies with Health & Safety Code sections 25249.5-25249.14; the award of attorney's fees is reasonable under California law; and the penalty amount is reasonable based on the criteria set forth in Health & Safety Code section 25249.7(b)(2).

Order and judgment are signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
